name: GAF_GenAI_ListAssets_Tool_v1
description: List GenAI assets (tools and agents) with optional filtering by name prefix and asset type.
instructions: List available GenAI assets. Parameters: prefix (optional) - Filter by name prefix, e.g., 'GAF' for Factory assets. asset_type (optional) - Filter by type: 'API_DOCS' (tools) or 'TOOLKIT' (agents). Returns: Array of {guid, name, type, description} objects. Example: To list Factory tools, call with prefix='GAF' and asset_type='API_DOCS'.

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /api/v1/tools
Query Parameters: None required - returns all tools. The response is filtered client-side by prefix and/or asset_type.
Example request:
GET /api/v1/tools
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON array of tool objects. Example response: [{"guid":"uuid-here","name":"Tool_Name","description":"Tool description","type":"API_DOCS"}]. Filter the results by: prefix - Match names starting with the prefix. asset_type - Match the type field.
